category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a CLI for creating and managing PrivateBin pastes; official GitHub README describes a command-line tool for interacting with PrivateBin.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses "PrivateBin CLI" branding and source_facts.name is privatebin-cli.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to its handbook; handbook says it is the documentation for the privatebin command-line interface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/gearnode/privatebin, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says CLI for PrivateBin pastes; official GitHub README describes secure/anonymous paste interaction from the terminal.
